name: SDS-Based Chemical Hazard Profile Entry
description:
The facility 'Keystone Surface Technologies' needs to update its Tier II report with a new chemical. Using the EPA Tier2 Submit application (already open), import the baseline facility data from C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Tier2Tasks\keystone_baseline.t2s. Then, navigate to the Chemicals section and add a new chemical entry for Phosphoric Acid with the following details derived from its SDS:
- Chemical Name: Phosphoric Acid
- CAS Number: 7664-38-2
- EHS: No
- Trade Secret: No
- Physical State: Liquid

Legacy OSHA Hazards:
- Immediate (Acute) Health Hazard: Yes
- Fire, Sudden Release of Pressure, Reactive, Delayed (Chronic): No

HCS 2012 GHS Physical Hazards:
- Corrosive to Metal: Yes
- All other physical hazards: No

HCS 2012 GHS Health Hazards:
- Acute Toxicity (any route): Yes
- Skin Corrosion or Irritation: Yes
- Serious Eye Damage or Eye Irritation: Yes
- Specific Target Organ Toxicity - Single Exposure: Yes
- All other health hazards: No

Inventory Data:
- Maximum Daily Amount: 75000 pounds
- Average Daily Amount: 50000 pounds
- Number of Days On-Site: 365

After configuring the chemical identity, physical state, legacy hazards, GHS hazards, and inventory quantities, save and export the submission file to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\Tier2Data\keystone_surface_tech.t2s.
